title: Dispatch schema three-way alignment: helper + guard + doc converge on live-probed codex spawn_agent schema, doc-canonical shape round-trip tested
action: Per D1: the validating canary report (reports/validation-canary.md) records what spawn_agent envelope codex 0.145.0 actually accepts. Align three surfaces on that observed schema: (a) dispatch-prepare.mjs ordinary codex branch (:389-397) emits the observed-required fields (task_name and/or fork_turns per evidence) instead of bare {agent_type, message}; (b) dispatch-guard.mjs evaluateCodexSpawn (:193-199) evaluates EVERY spawn_agent payload shape the helper emits and the doc teaches — matching on the tool name plus any observed shape, so a doc-canonical {task_name, message, fork_turns} payload is an OBSERVED shape that gets a real verdict, never a silent noOpinion; the unmarked-spawn DENY and the R18 rule (never judge an override envelope no probe observed) stay intact; (c) swarming-reference.md:134 states exactly the schema the helper now emits. Extend scripts/test_dispatch_prepare.mjs with a round-trip of the helper-emitted payload through evaluateDispatch AND a constructed doc-canonical payload through the guard (both directions #54 flagged as untested); extend hooks/test_model_guard.mjs rows for the new observed shape (marked=allow, unmarked=deny). Regen obligation inside THIS cell: node scripts/render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write; include regenerated projections + manifest in the diff.

truths: an unmarked codex spawn_agent payload in any emitted/documented shape is still denied
helper output, guard observation, and swarming-reference.md state the same schema
the doc-canonical shape gets a real guard verdict, not noOpinion
artifacts: round-trip tests covering helper-emitted and doc-canonical shapes
prohibitions: never weaken or remove the unmarked-spawn deny
never invent schema fields the canary did not observe (R18)
no hand-edits to vendored .bee/bin — canonical + regen only

verify: node scripts/test_dispatch_prepare.mjs && node hooks/test_model_guard.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check

trace.outcome: Three-way dispatch schema alignment on live-probed codex 0.145.0 (D1): helper ordinary codex branch now emits doc-canonical {task_name, message, fork_turns:none} (no agent_type — field absent from 0.145.0 schema, R18); guard evaluateCodexSpawn widened to judge EVERY spawn_agent payload by tool name + anchored message marker (doc-canonical AND legacy shapes get real verdicts, unmarked deny never weakened, override fields still never read per R18/B19); swarming-reference.md Spawn row states the probed schema + helper parity; round-trip tests cover both directions #54 flagged; vendored trees + projections + release manifest regenerated
